gist.headline: Zolio joins the garden
gist.blurb: Another beautiful app has sprouted in our community greenhouse. Welcome Zolio to the Pollinations ecosystem!
gist.summary: Added the community-built app Zolio to the business section of the Pollinations app showcase and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore Zolio in the community apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new app to the 'business' section of the greenhouse. A new potted plant with a tiny briefcase next to it, representing the Zolio business app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny necktie, watering a new glowing code-plant in a lush digital greenhouse. A small pixelated briefcase sits next to the lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
